message:
feat(tests): expand integration test coverage across 64 test suites (~10k lines)

Expands integration test depth across the engine's verification surface:

Core engine tests:
- lowering_pipeline, ir_contract, delegation_chain, benchmark_denominator,
  storage_adapter, migration_contract, module_cache, activation_lifecycle,
  governance_scorecard, synthesis_budget, ts_normalization

Flow/IFC/security tests:
- flow_lattice_enrichment_integration (obligation hint coverage),
  security_conformance, tee_attestation_policy, third_party_verifier,
  translation_validation, specialization_conformance

Enrichment integration tests (40+ suites):
- adversarial_campaign, ast, benchmark_behavior_equivalence, budgeted_
  optimization, bulkhead, capability_witness, checkpoint, conformance_harness,
  cross_workload_transfer, distribution_shift_monitor, extension_registry,
  frankenlab_release_gate, frankentui_adapter, frx_lockstep_oracle,
  galaxy_brain_explainability, governance_mechanism, hostcall_telemetry,
  incentive_governance_mechanism, incident_replay_bundle,
  lowering_pipeline_enrichment, metadata_substrate_optimized,
  novelty_synthesis_engine, observability_channel_model,
  opportunity_matrix, parser_cross_arch_repro_matrix, parser_error_recovery,
  plas_benchmark_bundle, proof_specialization_linkage,
  react_repro_triage, react_specialization_benchmark_gate,
  regexp_string_governance, replacement_lineage_log,
  revocation_freshness, rgc_planning_track_enrichment,
  runtime_diagnostics_cli_enrichment, slot_differential,
  slot_registry, static_analysis_graph, static_authority_analyzer,
  static_semantics, test262_release_gate, threshold_signing,
  tropical_semiring, trust_card, workload_transfer_prior

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
